title: Not A Toy
description:
Adds things that are DEFINITELY not toys.
Created for Modfest Toybox
body:
Created for Modfest Toybox, this joke mod adds some radioactive materials, and implements a radiation mechanic kind of.

### Features
**Radioactive Fun Goop:** This stuff is absolutely NOT a toy and should be avoided at all costs

**Waste Block:** A Barrel of nuclear waste filled with weird goop. Makes weird sounds with noteblocks.

**Radiation Mechanic:** When near radioactive blocks or irradiated entities, you will randomly take small hits of damage, the chances increase with the amount of sources.

**Radiation Sickness:** When irradiated by enough sources, you are effected by radiation sickness. This means you are now a radiation source!

[![Created for Modfest Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/aa6c3c7b64552dc8e6d37c0677bbe46edbe9a4c7/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/toybox)
